DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, HANSEL DOES 1 TO 10

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALIAO, LORENZO VALIAO, LILIBETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIGHT, CHRISTOPHER DAVID SUED AS HIGHT,CHRISTOPHER $10,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,500.00, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $10,500.00 BROKEN DOWN AS FOLLOWS: PLTF LILIBETH VALIAO TO RECOVER FROM DEFT $2,500.00 & PLTF LORENZO VALIAO TO RECOVER FROM DEFT $8,000.00. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR. SEE AWARD AT LENGTH.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALIAO, LORENZO VALIAO, LILIBETH AS TO DEFENDANT WIGHT, CHRISTOPHER DAVID SUED AS HIGHT,CHRISTOPHER
